name: Easy Maple Apple Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (8 ounces each) refrigerated crescent roll dough
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the brown sugar, all-purpose flour, WATKINS cinnamon, and WATKINS maple flavor.
2. Add the beaten egg, finely chopped apple, and chopped walnuts to the dry ingredients. Mix well until all components are evenly distributed.
3. Unroll the dough and separate it into 8 rectangles.
4. Press the perforations on each rectangle firmly to seal them.
5. Spread the apple mixture onto each rectangle, then roll up starting at the narrow end.
6. Place each roll lengthwise in a greased 8-1/2 inch loaf pan, making 2 layers of 4 rolls each.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20 minutes, then cover the pan with foil and bake for an additional 30 minutes. Remove the foil during the last 5 minutes of baking.
8. Cool the bread in the pan for 5 minutes before removing it to cool thoroughly.
9. Combine the powdered sugar, milk, and WATKINS vanilla extract in a small bowl. Drizzle over the cooled loaf.
